head: current_direct_bbox
hypothesis: E-34: MV3-Large cheap probe. DIoU + MV3-Large + T=5 + 224 + 8ep. E-23 tested MV3-Large with GIoU+center=0.2 and got 0.2840 (vs MV3-Small 0.2807, +0.0033 marginal). Hypothesis: DIoU's better gradients may unlock more from the larger backbone. If mIoU > E-28 (0.2893), MV3-Large is worth promoting to 30ep. If mIoU <= 0.2893, MV3-Large adds no value and we stay with Small.
